subcodes.first_line: O ye peoples of the Kingdom! How many a soul expended all its span of life in worship, endured the mortification of the flesh
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل ملکوت چقدر از نفوس که مدت حیات عبادت نمودند و ریاضت کشیدند و آرزوی
subcodes.subjects: @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @thankfulness; gratitude, @monasticism; asceticism, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees
